name: sidecar-lint
description: PreToolUse(Bash) auto-lint that fires on `git commit` in repos with .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, implemented in hexa-lang (`_sidecar_lint.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Non-blocking — emits additionalContext for: stale-history patterns in staged diff (commons @D g15), hardcoded /Users//home/ absolute paths (commons @D g13 · sidecar @D s3), marketplace.json plugin entry ↔ each plugin.json version drift (commons @D g22), hook .sh missing user-exec bit, missing CHANGELOG.md at repo root (commons @D g29), and — when the repo carries .claude-plugin/profiles.json (sidecar's multi-user enable profiles) — any marketplace plugin missing a tier there (sidecar @D s7: an untagged plugin silently defaults to 'personal', hidden from the minimal/hexa profiles), and any registered MCP-server plugin (project.tape @D s15 — `mcps/` source or `mcpServers` in plugin.json; no MCP-server plugins, stdio handshake blocks sessions). 0.8.0 — adds a top-level by-KIND source-folder check (project.tape @D s16: co-locate by owner/domain, no `docs/`·`state/` source buckets). Scans tracked top-level dirs via `git ls-files`, so a gitignored runtime `state/` never false-fires; advisory points to the by-owner shape (domain pair · plugin dir · root `*_POLICY.md`; runtime → $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/~/.sidecar per s3). Names like `build/`·`src/`·`archive/` are NOT flagged (legitimate across sibling repos). Self-excludes its own files + CHANGELOG.md. NO opt-out by design — no env var, no config file, no exception list.
